message:
feat(stdlib): Implement 5 core Lib/ modules batch 5

- collections.zig: namedtuple, Deque, Counter, OrderedDict, DefaultDict, ChainMap, UserDict/List/String
- queue.zig: Queue, LifoQueue, PriorityQueue, SimpleQueue with mutex-based thread safety
- weakref.zig: WeakRef, WeakKeyDictionary, WeakValueDictionary, WeakSet, Proxy, Finalizer
- contextlib.zig: ContextManager, Closing, Suppress, ExitStack, NullContext, Chdir, AbstractContextManager
- warnings.zig: WarningCategory, FilterAction, WarningFilter, WarningsState, CatchWarnings, warn/filterWarnings

All with comprehensive tests mirroring CPython behavior.
